reviews.title: A little underwhelming
reviews.positives: I liked the location
reviews.negatives:
Stayed at this 5-star hotel, though I suspect two of those stars got lost somewhere between breakfast and the balcony.

Let’s start with breakfast — a daily adventure in culinary confusion. The eggs were brave but overcooked, the bacon appeared to have dreams of becoming jerky, and the coffee… let’s just say it was more concept than caffeine. The room itself had “amenities,” but of the budget variety — more three-star practicality than five-star luxury. The air conditioning seemed to be powered by optimism rather than electricity, and the fire alarm light blinked like a rave invitation all night. Add to that a wardrobe light that refused to ever sleep, and you get quite the ambiance.

I paid extra for a balcony, which turned out to be a scenic viewing platform for standing — no chairs, no table, just me and my existential thoughts. The bar on the 36th floor? Less “craft beer haven,” more “brightly lit cafeteria with an identity crisis.” The view was just okay, and the whole place felt a bit dull and lackluster — not exactly where you’d linger over a drink.

All in all, a lovely building and friendly staff — but with a few too many quirks for the price tag. Five-star label, three-star experience, one-star comedy show.

We did it in the morning but they said they had no more rooms available (with so many rooms I doubt it, but still). They offered to deep clean the room and change the bedsheet. We said we preferred to have a different room as the humidity was clearly non going to be solved by cleaning the room, but no chance, that was the only option. Well, the room was cleaned so and so, the humidity was the same (all my clothes were wet, the passport cover bent) but we didn't tell anything anymore as we stayed only 2 nights and there was no point in spending our holiday complaining. Also, there was not much collaboration from the hotel staff on the matter. However, that's no way to solve an issue in a high quality hotel like that and at such an cost. reviews.title: Beautiful Hotel, but Serious Safety and Hygiene Failures
reviews.text:
My partner and I stayed at this 5-star property expecting luxury and security, but experienced major operational failures that completely ruined our peace of mind.

 The Positives: The hotel itself is beautiful with excellent views. After an issue on our first night, management initially tried to make it right by apologizing, offering complimentary drinks, and moving us to an upgraded suite.

 The Hygiene Issue: On night one, our original room had severe cleanliness and pest issues that should never happen at a luxury establishment.
 
The Security Breach: On night two in our new suite, someone actively used a working keycard to unlock our door in the evening. Thankfully, our manual deadbolt was engaged, stopping them from entering.

 The Response: The front desk took a baffling 30 minutes to update us, casually claiming it was "housekeeping" even though there was no knock or doorbell beforehand. They then dismissively asked if we "needed" a manager to apologize, completely downplaying a terrifying security scare.

A 5-star hotel must guarantee basic cleanliness and physical safety. Failing on both back-to-back nights with a slow, casual response from staff is unacceptable. If you stay here, always use your physical deadbolt immediately. We left feeling incredibly anxious and disappointed.
reviews.response:
Dear Shaina,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us.

While we are pleased to know that you appreciated the hotel’s stunning views and that our team made efforts to assist you during your stay, we sincerely regret the concerns you experienced. We are deeply concerned about the matters you have highlighted. Please rest assured that we take these issues very seriously, and immediate steps have been taken with our internal teams to review and enhance our procedures to prevent such situations in the future.

reviews.title: This hotel does not meet 5-star standards at all.
reviews.text:
My family booked three rooms after seeing decent photos on Agoda, but the reality was completely different. The rooms were clearly worn out: peeling leather on the headboards, old and frayed towels, and when I opened the blanket, there was a large dried blood stain. Completely unacceptable.

The swimming pool looked beautiful in the photos, but upon arrival we were told it was under maintenance. We were directed to use the pool in the neighboring building, only to be told by the staff there that we had to pay extra because we didn’t book directly with the hotel. This is the first time I’ve experienced something like this at a so-called 5-star property.

The elevators were constantly overcrowded, packed with people at all times. Breakfast was average at best, and the atmosphere felt more like a canteen than a luxury hotel.

On top of that, they overcharged us for laundry. We were initially given a bill of 1.2 million VND and told it was correct, but after I insisted they double-check, the actual amount turned out to be under 700,000 VND. This kind of mistake is unacceptable and raises serious concerns about their billing accuracy.

Overall, a very disappointing experience and far below expectations.

reviews.title: It doesn't live up to its name.
reviews.text:
Disadvantages:
1. I reserved an ocean view room but was assigned a partial ocean view room. When I spoke to the front desk, they initially did not acknowledge the mistake and insisted it was the same room. I found it ridiculous since full ocean view and partial ocean view rooms have different prices. Moreover, the partial ocean view actually has half an ocean view and half a construction site view. After complaining, they changed my room, but I wonder if they would have ignored it if I hadn't complained.

2. The elevators are very slow, making dining at breakfast very inconvenient.

3. The breakfast is not good. There are many options, but they all serve rice in various forms. Although there seem to be many varieties, there isn't much to eat.

4. I think they forgot to clean my room on the first day.

5. The pool feels different from the pictures. It wasn't bad, as I enjoyed it, but it looks oddly different from the photos, and the water is quite deep.

6. The lobby is outdated.

Advantages:
1. The sauna is very nice.
2. The spa staff are friendly and give great massages.
3. The staff who help with luggage are very kind and pleasant.

reviews.title: Un 5 étoiles où seul le personnel brille!!
reviews.positives: La gentillesse du personnel et le petit déjeuner.
reviews.negatives:
Nous avons séjourné au Four Points by Sheraton Da Nang avec des attentes élevées compte tenu du standing annoncé, mais l’expérience a été très contrastée.
Dès notre arrivée, les premières chambres proposées étaient difficilement supportables en raison d’odeurs très fortes, au point de nous piquer le nez. Après un changement, la chambre 1509 sentait le chien mouillé, et la 1511 présentait une odeur de moisi persistante. Le personnel nous a d’ailleurs confirmé que les animaux étaient autorisés dans les chambres, ce qui pourrait expliquer en partie ces désagréments. Nous avons également constaté des signes d’usure visibles, comme une tête de lit abîmée, probablement griffée.
Lors de notre visite de l'hôtel, nous avons eu la mauvaise surprise de découvrir que la piscine était en réparation donc inutilisable sur une partie. Nous aurions souhaité en être averti en amont, c'est ce qui avait motivé notre choix d'hôtels.... une déconvenue de plus !!!
De manière générale, l’hôtel semble mal vieillir. Malgré le professionnalisme et la gentillesse des femmes de ménage, qui font leur travail avec sérieux, l’état des chambres (moquettes sales et malodorantes) et certaines odeurs désagréables jusque dans le lobby donnent une impression globale peu agréable.
Il serait sans doute plus pertinent de porter l’attention sur l’entretien en profondeur des chambres plutôt que sur des rénovations superficielles.

Spanking new hotel (6 months old) with great facilities. We used the steamroom and sauna quite a bit. My only gripe was that the lockers in the changing rooms were very hard to open as they had no handles.

Staff are all very friendly and attentive. The front desk is especially good with information and helpful suggestions on sights to see. Rooftop bar staff were also knowledgeable about the beverages they were serving. Perhaps a little brushing up needed for the restaurant. My husband ordered a minestrone soup and pasta for dinner and after quite a bit of a wait, both were served at the same time. Also, the Japanese buffet needs some refinement.

I have mixed feelings about the location. It’s beachfront with a beautiful view because we had a room facing the sea. However, there really isn’t much else in the immediate vicinity.

All in all, a good stay and experience.

reviews.title: First time in Da Nang
reviews.text:
My first trip to Da Nang
The hotel is located at the end of My Khe Beach, with the beach right in front of it.
It's a quiet beach with few people, making it comfortable to spend time. It's a shame that there are no facilities like umbrellas on the beach, though.
There were many Korean guests at the hotel, and the menu included a lot of Korean dishes, but there was a good variety and the bread was delicious.
While some of the hotel facilities, like the USB ports, were broken, it’s necessary to check whether they work, but other outlets were fine.
There was a Panasonic hairdryer, and the bath was comfortable.
There was also a convenience store next to the hotel, which was convenient.
The only downside is that the elevator was slow, and you always had to wait, but otherwise, it was a comfortable hotel to stay in.
reviews.response:
Dear 春美,
Thank you very much for sharing your experience during your first trip to Da Nang. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere of My Khe Beach and appreciated the convenient location of our hotel, as well as the comfort of the bath. It is wonderful to know that you found the breakfast delicious and enjoyed the variety of food options available.
We truly value your feedback regarding the USB ports and elevator. Please rest assured that we are taking steps to address these areas for improvement. Your insights help us enhance the experience for all our guests.
We look forward to welcoming you back in the future and providing an even more enjoyable stay.

Warm regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Danang

reviews.title: Very nice hotel with a few glitches
reviews.text:
First of all I should say we liked this hotel very much and found the staff very helpful. Breakfast was good, considering there were a lot of different nationalities to cater for. We did have a few issues on arrival , namely that the blind between the bedroom and bathroom didn’t work and a light in the bedroom was constantly flashing. Within a few minutes of reporting it staff arrived to fix it. We then found that the wardrobe light wouldn’t turn off which didn’t help our sleep quality. I booked a room with a sea view and a balcony because I like to sit on the balcony and read but there was no furniture there. I asked at reception and was told it was for safety. I found this a little strange as we’d previously been staying on the 36th floor in a different hotel and had nice chairs and a table. Not much point paying for a room with a balcony if you can’t use it. 
We found the bed very comfortable and softer than in other hotels we’d stayed in during our time in Vietnam. The hotel’s a little bit away from the night market and dragon bridge but Grab cars are very inexpensive.
reviews.response:
Dear Hossam,
Thank you very much for taking the time to share such detailed feedback with us. We are truly delighted to know that you enjoyed your stay overall and that our helpful associates and diverse breakfast selection made a positive impression. It is also wonderful to hear that you found our bed exceptionally comfortable during your visit to Vietnam - our signature Four Points Comfort Bed is designed to offer a truly restful sleep.
We sincerely appreciate your comments regarding the lighting. We are glad that our team was able to respond quickly and resolve the concerns promptly, and we apologize for the inconvenience these issues caused. We truly appreciate you sharing your thoughts about the balcony, and your feedback has been passed to our management team for further improvement where possible.
Our hotel offers a tranquil setting near My Khe Beach while still providing convenient access to nearby attractions. Our team is always happy to assist with transportation arrangements

Kind regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Danang

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
I started off in a good mood thanks to the kindness of the check-in hotel staff. The room condition was satisfying, and I was impressed by the ocean view, while the gym was clean and well-maintained. However, I was a bit disappointed with the breakfast and the swimming pool. There weren't many menu options worth eating again aside from desserts and bakery items. When I visited the pool, it was outdoors and the water was cold, and it was smaller and less clean than it appeared in the photos, which was disappointing (probably because it was outside, right? haha).

However, considering the other advantages, if I come back to Da Nang, I would be willing to revisit and recommend it to friends. There must be a clear reason why there are many Koreans here.
reviews.response:
Dear Park,
Thank you for sharing your experience with us! We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your stay and found our staff friendly and enthusiastic, as we take great pride in providing excellent service. It is also wonderful to know that you enjoyed the condition of your room, the breathtaking ocean view, and the well-maintained gym. It means a lot to us that these aspects of your stay met your expectations.

Regarding breakfast, we're continuously improving our culinary offerings to meet all guests' expectations. We are sorry to hear that the swimming pool did not fully meet your expectations. Your comments are well noted and the hotel team and myself will look into the raised concerns in order to make necessary corrections, in areas where that is possible.

It is great to hear that you would visit us again and recommend us to your friends. We truly look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Da Nang and providing an even better experience.
Best regards, 
Four Poin

reviews.title: Exceptional short-stay vacation
reviews.text:
We were staying during very low-key season so there were not many people to keep the atmosphere quiet and relaxed enough for our honeymoon. 

The staffs were very friendly and helpful, and they tried their best to support us during our stay, despite lack of human resources and some facilities (since they just re-opened after a few months due to the pandemic).

Highly recommended. Definitely will return!
reviews.response:
Dear Linh,

Thank you for your wonderful review! We are thrilled to hear that you had an exceptional short-stay vacation at Four Points by Sheraton Danang, especially during such a low-key season. It's fantastic to know that our staff made your honeymoon memorable with their friendly and helpful service, despite the challenges of reopening after the pandemic.

Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we appreciate your understanding regarding any temporary limitations in facilities. We look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay in the future.

Best regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Danang

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text:
We loved almost everything about this hotel! The room was exceptional , sleek, sturdy, and very comfortable. The bed was soft and bouncy, everything was squeaky clean, and the design felt modern and well thought out.

We also really enjoyed the free access to the steam room, sauna, jacuzzi, and the beautiful pool overlooking the beach  such a relaxing experience and definitely one of the highlights of our stay.

The only downsides were minor: the refrigerator in the room was locked since it contained drinks for sale, so we couldn’t use it to cool our bottled water. There was no weighing scale in the room either (though we didn’t ask if one could be borrowed). We also requested our breakfast to be packed the night before since we had to leave early, but it only included bread, salad, and fruits — no meat at all, which was a bit disappointing.

Overall, we absolutely loved the hotel’s facilities, cleanliness, and comfort  just a few small details away from being perfect!
reviews.response:
Dear Monika,
Thank you very much for sharing your wonderful review. It is a pleasure to know that you enjoyed an exceptional stay and that the room design, comfort, and cleanliness created such a positive impression. We are also delighted to hear that the steam room, sauna, jacuzzi, and our beautiful pool overlooking the My Khe Beach added relaxing moments to your visit.
We truly appreciate your thoughtful comments regarding other aspects, and your feedback will guide us as we continue to enhance the guest experience.
We sincerely hope to welcome you back again for another comfortable and memorable beachside stay.

Best regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Danang

1.飯店大門口對面，是一片雜草樹林，且是用鐵皮圍起來的。在一開始選擇這飯店主要是想過個馬路就能悠閒的到沙灘。所以在飯店環境是有些許的失望。只能沿著小路走到沙灘。
2.房間壁紙有些許的發霉，應該是海邊濕氣的因素。

reviews.title: Overall satisfied.
reviews.text:
"The Deluxe Guest room, 2 Twin, Partial ocean view, Tub" had a spacious room compared to other hotels in the same price range, and it was cleaner as well. The bathroom and shower were separate, making it comfortable to use. The pool was also large and enjoyable. Although it is a bit far from My Khe Beach, a quiet beach spread out right in front made it very comfortable. Next time, I would like to stay in an ocean view room that is not partial. The breakfast had a wide variety and was enjoyable every day. It certainly felt like a Sheraton. The room was also quiet.

The only disappointing point was that the room's refrigerator was the recently common type referred to as a minibar, which doesn't cool. I would have preferred a mini refrigerator that can make ice.

However, considering that it might be a good choice for those who are not used to traveling abroad or for bringing older parents, even if it's a bit more expensive, this hotel could be a good option.
reviews.response:
Dear Yuichi,
Thank you very much for your thoughtful and detailed feedback. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay in our Deluxe Guest Room with a bathtub, and appreciated the spacious layout, cleanliness, and the comfort of having a separate bath and shower. It is also wonderful to know that you found the rooftop pool enjoyable and the quiet beachfront setting relaxing.

We are glad that our breakfast selection met your expectations and that the overall atmosphere reflected the Four Points by Sheraton experience you were looking for. Your feedback about the refrigerator is truly appreciated, and we will certainly take it into consideration as we continue to enhance our amenities.

We would be thrilled to welcome you back next time in a room with a full ocean view for an even more memorable stay in Danang.

Warm regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Danang

reviews.title: Good Location, Comfort Room and Nice Balcony View, Excellent Service
reviews.text:
Am actually travelling with my mother, but there were no such option. Generally everything was good except 2 things...My room type was seaview with balcony king bed.

Good: 
Location: perfect location, exactly by the sea across the road. This seaside is not busy but very nice to view from the room, only 2 mins walk to the seaside. There are surfing lessons and seaside fishing using a huge hand pulling net by this side of beach everyday, which is very interesting to view. 
Service: Excellent! they are very attentive to our requests. they email to inform that my request for twin bed was not available so they upgraded the room to a panoramic seaview room maintaining the king bed which was very kind. 
Room: There are separate shower room which is very good and safe for my mother. Comfortable bed. Balcony View: Overlooking the beautiful south china sea and whole coastline, busy road, and linh ung pagoda on the left.
Breakfast: wide variety and delicious breakfast, excellent staffs in the restaurant too.  

Bad: 
Balcony: it was the biggest waste- there is no outdoor seating chairs and table for a good cup of coffee and tea while enjoying the superb seaview from the balcony. 
Pool: The rooftop pool was not so well maintained and very small, it is covered which is good for those afraid of hot sun but not so good for the panoramic seaview or if you are expecting an open infinity pool view. it doesnt attract me going to the pool for the 4 days stay. i think my room has better view than the pool. i just dont understand why most of the hotels in Danang with rooftop pool are fully covered, leaving you to see the view through the huge glass which doesnt maintained clean. it was really a huge waste for that perfect seaview or riverview. 

Overall this is a nice hotel to stay if you are ok with the 2 minor negative points that mentioned.

reviews.title: Fantastic hotel, and don’t miss the view from the bar on the 36th floor!
reviews.text:
Our room (superior double, 25th floor, facing the bay) was beautifully appointed and spotlessly clean. The oversized king bed was a luxurious dream come true. I should point out that, as others have noted, the room is a bit small, but for a couple like us it’s “cosy”. The rooms are very well soundproofed and you don’t hear any noise from the street below. (Do not underestimate the importance of this, as drivers here are constantly honking their horns, and the noise can drive you crazy).

The cherry on top is a fantastic bar on the 36th floor, offering a spectacular view of the sunset over the city with the mountains in the backdrop. Happy Hour is 5-7pm daily with a great selection of draught and bottles craft beers at “buy one get one free”, and a free flow of snacks.

Generally, hotel staff in Vietnam are very friendly and attentive, and here was no exception. Everyone went the extra mile to ensure we had a great stay. 

The Sheraton Four Points is more like a business hotel, and although it faces the beach, if you are a family with kids you may want to consider a more “resort-style” place such as the Furama. Other reviews mention that the lifts are a bit slow, and we did notice that too. 

The hotel is very new, and exceedingly good value at around US$120 per night. For only a slightly higher price than the other “local” hotels that line the beach, you get 5 star luxury and an experience that is on a whole different level. We will definitely stay there again. Very highly recommended to anyone visiting Da Nang!
reviews.response:
Dear Micheal, 
 Warmest greeting from Four Points by Sheraton Danang!

Thank you for taking time to share your feedback. I am delighted to learn that you were impressed by our room, rooftop Bar and the Happy Hour program . I am glad that you enjoyed the stay with us and would like to return in the future. 
I share your feedback to the rest of my team and believe that not only them but also other travelers will find your review truly inspiring. 

Thank you again! My team and me hope to have a chance to accommodate you again in the nearest future. 

All the best wishes from Four Points by Sheraton Danang. 

Stefano Maccagno
General Manager
Four Points by Sheraton Danang

reviews.title: Best stay
reviews.text:
We had a wonderful stay here. The service was exceptional, and we were especially helped by Miss Duyen during check-in. I truly appreciate that the hotel kept their promise and fulfilled all of my special room requests made prior to arrival. Every staff member—from the security, restaurant team, to the receptionists—was incredibly friendly and welcoming.
Our room was very comfortable on a high floor with a perfect view. Housekeeping was amazing. The only minor thing is that the room soundproofing could be improved. As for the food, some dishes could use a little upgrade in flavor, but overall it was still good. Highly recommended!
reviews.response:
Dear Novia,
Thank you very much for your wonderful review.
We are truly delighted to know that you had such a memorable stay with us and that our associates, especially Ms. Duyen, made a positive impression during your arrival. It is always rewarding to hear that we were able to fulfill your room preferences and ensure a smooth check-in experience.
We are also pleased that you enjoyed the comfort of your room, the beautiful high-floor view, and the attentive service from our housekeeping team. Your kind recognition of our associates across all departments means a great deal to us.
We truly appreciate your valuable feedback on other aspects, as it helps us continue improving and delivering an even better experience. Your insights are important to us as we work to enhance both our facilities and dining offerings.
Thank you once again for your recommendation. We truly look forward to welcoming you back for another exceptional stay in the future.

Best regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Dana

reviews.title: Excellent service and beautiful views!
reviews.text:
The service at this hotel is top-notch! Big thanks to Miss Duyen who was extremely helpful during our check-in process. All the staff, including the security guards, restaurant crew, and receptionists, were always smiling and polite.
We got a room on a higher floor and the view was absolutely spot on. The room itself was very cozy and cleaned daily without prompt. Just a small note that the room isn't completely soundproof. For the breakfast/food, some items could taste better with a bit of a flavor upgrade, but so far so good. Would definitely come back!
reviews.response:

Thank you very much for your wonderful feedback. We are truly delighted to know that you enjoyed our service and the beautiful views. Your kind recognition of Miss Duyen and our team members, including our security, Food and Beverage, and Front Office colleagues, means a great deal to all of us.

Thank you once again for your kind words and recommendation. It is our great pleasure to welcome you, and we eagerly look forward to welcoming you back for another exceptional and memorable stay in the future.
 
Warm regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Danang

The most impressive part was the ice for the ice bath after the race.
reviews.response:
Dear Thundra,
Thank you for your wonderful feedback. We are truly delighted to know that your stay felt like home and that our team at all levels could support you throughout your Ironman 70.3 Da Nang race.
It is especially rewarding to hear that our early breakfast arrangements and post-race recovery support for triathletes, including the ice bath service, exceeded your expectations. Our team always strives to anticipate the needs of our guests, and it is our pleasure to contribute to your successful and memorable sports journey.
We look forward to welcoming you back for another comfortable and inspiring stay in Da Nang.

Best regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Danang

reviews.response:
Dear Klara,
Thank you very much for sharing your wonderful feedback with us. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our cozy atmosphere, great location by My Khe Beach, and the beautiful ocean view from your balcony. We are also pleased that you found the room clean and the bed comfortable. Our signature Four Points Comfort Bed is designed to ensure a truly restful sleep experience.
It is fantastic to know that watching the sunrise from your bed made your stay even more special. We are glad that the complimentary bike rental added extra fun to your Danang adventure, and our team is very happy to hear your kind words about their helpful service.
Thank you once again for choosing Four Points by Sheraton Danang. We truly look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay by the beach.

Best regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Danang

reviews.response:

Thank you very much for choosing to celebrate your birthday with us and for sharing such a heartwarming review. It is truly wonderful to know that our team created a memorable experience for your special day. We are delighted that you enjoyed the room upgrade, the birthday cake, the small gift, and the thoughtful message prepared by our team.
Your kind words about our communication during the Kalmaegi typhoon mean a great deal to us. The safety and comfort of our guests are always our highest priorities, and we are glad that our reassurance helped ease your concerns.
Your recognition of our team’s care and hospitality is sincerely appreciated. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another comfortable and memorable stay.

Best regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Danang

reviews.title: Very comfortable beautiful ocean view resort in Da Nang!
reviews.text: This is the 2nd time we stayed at Four Points by Sheraton Danang and we had a comfortable stay here this time too. We really love this hotel and next time when we return to Da Nang, we will definitely stay here!!
reviews.response:
Dear Kyo,
Thank you so much for choosing Four Points by Sheraton Danang once again! We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the beautiful ocean views and had another comfortable stay with us. It means a lot to know that our hotel is your preferred choice when visiting Da Nang.
We look forward to welcoming you back on your next trip!

Warm regards,
Four Points by Sheraton Danang
